assertions.description: The local-network-access permission is restricted to secure contexts.
fetch remains the primary surface that triggers an LNA prompt for cross-address-space requests.
navigator.permissions.query exists so userland can probe the local-network and loopback-network permissions.
XMLHttpRequest is still exposed; LNA gates the underlying request but does not remove the API.
Permissions Policy is the surface the LocalNetworkAccessPermissionsPolicyDefaultEnabled enterprise policy plumbs through; an allowsFeature surface exists.
The old PNA preflight required a `Access-Control-Request-Private-Network` header; userland can still construct that header even though it is no longer the gating mechanism.
